Name: Baseline and process
Scope: Code findings only (see devops/ for K8s, Docker, nginx).
Approach: One work package per PR; re-export Sigrid after each phase.
RisksIfDoneWrong: Mixing infra and app changes in one PR
Verification: Sigrid code findings improve per phase

Name: Backend npm dependency upgrades
Scope: multer, undici, nodemailer in backend/package.json + package-lock.json
Approach: Run npm audit in backend/; upgrade targeted packages; smoke-test file upload and API flows.
RisksIfDoneWrong: Breaking changes in multer/nodemailer; lockfile drift if partial updates
SigridRemarkStrategy: Single lockfile regeneration in one PR

Name: Frontend xlsx dependency
Scope: xlsx alias npm:@e965/xlsx in root package.json
Approach: Confirm lockfile uses patched fork; bump fork if needed; test Excel export/import.
RisksIfDoneWrong: Excel export regressions in report flows

Name: verify-regio-apis SQL injection
Approach: Fix parameterized queries in .ts; delete stale .js; OR exclude backend/scripts/ from scan.
RisksIfDoneWrong: Breaking local verify script; Sigrid still flags .js if not removed
Verification: Clears 2 CRITICAL RAW; npm run verify:regio-apis passes
SigridRemarkStrategy: Dev-only script — not production attack surface

Name: sendEmail.ts single refactor
Scope: backend/src/routes/emails/sendEmail.ts — 0 Security RAW, 15 Security total, 2 maintainability
Approach: One PR: extract HTML builders, puppeteer PDF service (keep request blocking), mail sender; thin route handler.
RisksIfDoneWrong: PDF layout/email regressions; double-touch if done before WP-01
Verification: Manual spoedrapport test; clears multiple Security + maintainability findings
SigridRemarkStrategy: Do not split security and refactor into separate PRs on same file

Name: Keycloak callback open redirect
Approach: Confirm safeReturnPath(); add unit tests; Sigrid remark if satisfied.
SigridRemarkStrategy: Likely false positive — do not remove validation

Name: renderDownloadPage HTML template
Approach: Escape all interpolated data; share HTML utilities with WP-06.

Name: fileDownload.ts verify FIXED
Approach: Regression check only when touching download flow.

Name: Flight plan Buttons pattern
Scope: Shared 9-10 line button blocks across Voorbereiding wizard steps
Approach: Extract shared component/hook; one PR per cluster; UI smoke on affected flows.
RisksIfDoneWrong: Wizard UI regressions; merge conflicts if clusters combined
DependsOn: Independent unless same file as WP-06
